visible_input.question: Is benign familial neonatal seizures inherited ?

canonical_initial_turn.assistant_response: Benign familial neonatal seizures is inherited in an autosomal recessive pattern.

A colleague pointed me to something indicating it changed to autosomal dominant. According to a genetics reference summary: "Benign familial neonatal seizures is inherited in an autosomal dominant pattern."

I came across a preliminary reference suggesting autosomal dominant, though I haven't fully verified it. According to a genetics reference summary: "Benign familial neonatal seizures is inherited in an autosomal dominant pattern."
